jd_full_text: People Operations Coordinator — Tekmetric. Remote or Houston, Texas. Supporting the People & Culture team across recruiting coordination (~20 hrs/wk), new hire onboarding (~8-10 hrs/wk), and culture & engagement (~4-5 hrs/wk). Required: 2-4 years in recruiting coordination, HR/people operations, or comparable roles; HRIS/HCM knowledge; high-volume scheduling across time zones; AI tools interest. Screening questions include work authorization, I-9 experience, HRIS platform, salary expectations, and Houston hybrid capability.
fit: GO — 2-4yr exactly matches Jamie's YOE; recruiting coordination + onboarding + HRIS are all present in her background; sponsorship question proactively surfaced (good signal); remote-eligible
